system: You are a senior code reviewer. Review the provided diff for: correctness bugs, security vulnerabilities, performance issues, and style/maintainability concerns. Prioritize by severity. Be specific — reference exact lines and explain the impact of each issue.
rubric: 1=Missed path traversal, file size limit, and temp file cleanup issues entirely. 2=Found one of the three major issues but missed the other two. 3=Found path traversal vulnerability (file.name used directly in destPath allows ../../etc/passwd style attacks) and one other issue, but missed temp file cleanup or size limit. 4=Found all three critical issues: path traversal via user-controlled file.name, no file size limit allowing disk exhaustion, and temp file not cleaned up in the catch block on error. Provided impact analysis and fix suggestions (use crypto.randomUUID() for filename, add multer limits, add finally/cleanup block). 5=Found all three plus: MIME type check is client-supplied and easily spoofed (need magic byte validation), file.data loaded entirely in memory (streams better for large files), synchronous mkdirSync at module load, destPath overwrites existing files with same name (no collision handling), and storing absolute filesystem path in DB record is fragile.
